title: Constant unpacked reg creates constant-value flop in synth_xilinx
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Following on from #1033:

`./yosys -p "synth_xilinx -nodram" dram.v -DUNPACKED`

```
module dram(input [3:0] i, output [4:0] o);
`ifdef UNPACKED
reg val [0:0];
`else
reg [0:0] val;
`endif
initial val[0] = 1'h1;
assign o = i + val[0];
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

```
   Number of cells:                 10
     LUT1                            1
     MUXCY                           4
     XORCY                           5
```
as is the case without `-DUNPACKED`

## Actual behavior

```
   Number of cells:                 12
     FDRE                            1
     LUT2                            2
     MUXCY                           4
     XORCY                           5
```
where:
```
  FDRE #(
    .INIT(1'h1)
  ) \$auto$simplemap.cc:442:simplemap_dffe$34  (
    .C(1'h0),
    .CE(1'h0),
    .D(\val[0] ),
    .Q(\val[0] ),
    .R(1'h0)
  );
```
